---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an AirPods control or workflow
labels: enhancement
---

**What you want to do**

The user-visible behaviour. Skip "make podctl better" — be specific.

**Why the existing commands don't cover it**

Which verbs you tried, what happened.

**AAP capture (if you have one)**

If this is a new AirPods setting whose AAP byte layout isn't in the
codebase yet, attaching a `btmon` capture taken while toggling the
setting on iOS makes the request actionable. Otherwise it stays a
"want list" item until someone captures it.
